product_overview: Sebuah sistem manajemen klinik yang menyatukan antarmuka pasien, dokter, dan admin untuk pengelolaan antrean, pemeriksaan, dan jadwal. Fokus pada realtime antrean pasien, akses terautentikasi untuk dokter/admin, dan kemudahan penggunaan pada perangkat mobile serta desktop.
core_goals: Pastikan alur utama pasien, dokter, dan admin dapat dijalankan tanpa error (UAT-ready).
Sediakan data antrean realtime yang sinkron bagi pasien dan petugas (minimalkan kondisi sinkronisasi).
Amankan akses API untuk area dokter dan admin (autentikasi & otorisasi).
Sediakan API manajemen jadwal bagi admin dan antarmuka profile bagi pasien.
Tingkatkan aksesibilitas dan UX di mobile (Dark Mode, ukuran font, indikator offline).

features.name: Authentication & Profile
features.description: Registrasi, login, dan pengelolaan profil pasien (termasuk preferensi tampilan seperti Dark/Light mode).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid user data -> Receive 201 Created with user id -> POST /api/auth/login with credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/profile with token -> Receive 200 with user profile -> PATCH /api/profile with token and updated fields -> Receive 200 with updated profile
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PATCH /api/profile/theme with token and {theme: "dark"} -> Receive 200 with persisted theme preference
PATCH /api/profile with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Pasien Antrian API
features.description: Menampilkan antrean saat ini untuk pasien dan memungkinkan pasien mengambil nomor antrean; endpoint publik untuk melihat antrean (read-only) tersedia tanpa autentikasi.
user_flows: GET /api/pasien/antrian -> Receive 200 with Queue[] (current live queue) -> POST /api/pasien/antrian/take with patient info -> Receive 201 with assigned queue number -> GET /api/pasien/antrian -> Receive 200 with Queue[] including new entry
GET /api/pasien/antrian -> Receive 200 with Queue[] -> GET /api/pasien/antrian (later poll) -> Receive 200 with updated Queue[] showing 'currently served' changed (live update via polling)
POST /api/pasien/antrian/take with invalid payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /api/pasien/antrian -> Network timeout / no response (client should show offline indicator)

features.name: Dokter Pemeriksaan API
features.description: Endpoint terautentikasi bagi dokter untuk melihat antrean pemeriksaan, memanggil pasien, dan menandai pemeriksaan selesai.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid doctor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dokter/pemeriksaan with token -> Receive 200 with Queue[]

POST /api/auth/login with valid doctor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PATCH /api/dokter/pemeriksaan/{queueId}/call with token -> Receive 200 updating queue status to 'called' -> GET /api/dokter/pemeriksaan with token -> Receive 200 reflecting 'called' status
PATCH /api/dokter/pemeriksaan/{invalidQueueId}/call with token -> Receive 404 Not Found

POST /api/auth/login with valid doctor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> PATCH /api/dokter/pemeriksaan/{queueId}/complete with token and medical record -> Receive 200 marking entry as 'completed'

features.name: Admin Jadwal API
features.description: Endpoint terautentikasi untuk admin mengelola jadwal dokter dan meninjau daftar jadwal yang ada (dashboard dan tabel manajemen jadwal).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/admin/jadwal with token -> Receive 200 with Schedule[]

POST /api/auth/login with valid admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/admin/jadwal with token and new schedule payload -> Receive 201 Created with new schedule id -> GET /api/admin/jadwal with token -> Receive 200 including new schedule
POST /api/admin/jadwal with token and malformed payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /api/admin/jadwal with non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden
